caption: A man with white hair and a white beard is delivering a speech from behind a wooden lectern. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a cream-colored sleeveless jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the lectern in front of him. He stands against a backdrop of dark green, textured stone wall panels with a geometric, stepped design. To his sides, there are cylindrical gold-colored pillars containing decorative pink flowers. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his hands. In the beginning, he looks slightly to the side with his arms down. As the scene progresses, he brings his hands up, eventually raising his right index finger to emphasize a point while looking forward. His facial expressions shift from a neutral speaking posture to a more animated expression as he gestures.
